children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Pursuant to the authorization of appropriations in section 3103(a), $25,000,000 may be used for purposes of carrying out this subchapter.1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Compensation fund
children.label: b Compensation fund
children.text: There is hereby authorized to be appropriated $250,000,000 to the Energy Employees Occupational Illness Compensation Fund established by .section 7384e of this title
